creator: lioux@gns.com.br
text:
The make command is working for the root user, yet not for any other user. The perms are correct, any user can reach the file and execute it, perms 0555. However the make command replies -> make: command unavailable.

How-To-Repeat: Strange. I can't reproduce the problem in any other system, but this one. Just issue the make command as a plain user.
